CREATE TABLE strings_table (str String, suffix String);
INSERT INTO strings_table VALUES ('中国', '\xbd'), ('测试', '\xe8'), ('Hello World', 'World');
SELECT str, suffix, endsWithUTF8(str, suffix) AS result FROM strings_table WHERE result = 1;
SELECT end, startsWithUTF8(end, suffix) AS matches FROM (SELECT str AS end FROM strings_table) WHERE matches = 1;
INSERT INTO more_strings VALUES ('こんにちは'), ('안녕하세요'), ('Привет');
SELECT str, endsWithUTF8(str, 'Hello') AS is_end FROM (SELECT 'Hello World' AS str UNION SELECT 'Hello') WHERE is_end = 1;
SELECT t1.str, t2.suffix, endsWithUTF8(t1.str, t2.suffix) FROM strings_table AS t1 CROSS JOIN more_strings AS t2;
SELECT suffix FROM strings_table WHERE endsWithUTF8(str, suffix) AND length(suffix) > 0;
SELECT str FROM strings_table WHERE endsWithUTF8(str, '') = 1;
SELECT DISTINCT endsWithUTF8(str, suffix) AS result FROM strings_table GROUP BY str, suffix HAVING result = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM strings_table WHERE endsWithUTF8(str, '中国') = 1;
SELECT str FROM (SELECT str FROM strings_table UNION ALL SELECT str FROM more_strings) AS combined WHERE endsWithUTF8(str, '\xe8') = 1;
